commands.command: node --test --test-name-pattern "Permission Audit Test Golden Interaction Set" packages/control-plane/test/service.test.js

plan_generation_receipt.purpose: Regenerated closeout pack plan and next-pack queue after CP00-077 evidence assembly.
plan_generation_receipt.result_summary: Plan generated with 1176 packs and 53839 units; next queue starts after CP00-077.

preliminary_expected_failure.failure_reason: CP00-077 evidence files were not created yet; contract and closeout rows already pointed at docs/closeout-packs/cp00-077.

claude_review_command.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --system-prompt "read-only code reviewer" --output-format json < /tmp/cp00-077-review-prompt.txt > /tmp/cp00-077-claude-review-output.json

evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: C00 actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review required before production_ready
evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval remains metadata-bound; this pack creates no review queue, approval record, assignment, notification, or product-state write.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

CP00-077 is metadata-only and does not execute runtime permission, AuthZ, security trimming, audit, fixture, test, golden, database, storage, idempotency, lock, product-state, approval, review-queue, or LDIP implementation logic.
